summary: Verified Super Admin Panel loading fix for infinite spinner bug. Panel now loads correctly (though with ~10-15s delay in automated browser due to React StrictMode double-mount and network latency). All 13 backend tests pass. UI displays correctly with metrics, tenant list, and New Client button. The AbortController + cancelled flag implementation in useEffect properly handles React StrictMode.

super_admin_login.details: Returns access_token and user data correctly

super_admin_auth_me.details: Returns super admin profile without password

super_admin_tenants_list.details: Returns list of tenants with user_count enrichment

super_admin_clients_legacy.details: Legacy compatibility endpoint maps tenants to client format

panel_ui_loading.details: Panel loads data after initial spinner. Fix uses AbortController with cancelled flag to handle React StrictMode double-mount. Console shows 'Data load complete, setting loading to false' after successful data fetch.

new_client_wizard_button.details: New Client button visible with data-testid='new-client-btn'

critical_code_review_comments: SuperAdminPanel.js useEffect correctly implements AbortController + cancelled flag pattern for React StrictMode compatibility
The 'Starting data load...' appears multiple times in console due to StrictMode double-mount behavior - this is expected and not a bug
Data eventually loads successfully as confirmed by 'Tenants loaded: 2' and 'Data load complete, setting loading to false' console logs

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Panel loads, shows correct data, New Client button visible

seed_data_creation: Existing tenants: ocean_fresh, blue_ocean, test_tenant_* (from previous tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Panel infinite loading spinner bug is FIXED. The fix uses AbortController with a local 'cancelled' flag in useEffect. Panel takes 10-15 seconds to load in automated browser (React StrictMode causes double-mount, and there's network latency to preview URL). Backend APIs all working correctly. All 13 tests in test_super_admin_panel.py pass. Note: test_super_admin_api.py has stale test client IDs and needs updating if used.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Infinite loading spinner in Super Admin Panel due to React StrictMode async state management issues
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: React StrictMode double-mounts components in development, causing race conditions with async data loading. The previous implementation likely had issues where setLoading(false) was not being called after StrictMode unmount/remount cycle.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: useEffect now uses AbortController for axios request cancellation plus a local 'cancelled' flag. On cleanup, cancelled is set to true and controller.abort() is called. The finally block only calls setLoading(false) if !cancelled, preventing state updates on unmounted component.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Console shows 'Data load complete, setting loading to false' after data fetches successfully, and UI transitions from loading spinner to panel content
